form.formComment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won by 1.75 lengths at Ballarat (25.36) beating Aston Fixer in a Maiden on April 15. Will find this much tougher but he's got good box manners and speed. Returned in great order and can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won by 1.75 lengths at Ballarat (25.36) beating Aston Fixer in a Maiden on April 15. Will find this much tougher but he's got good box manners and speed. Returned in great order and can make it back to back wins.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (25.55) over 450m at Ballarat. Aided by a low draw and is worth plenty of thought.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (25.55) over 450m at Ballarat. Aided by a low draw and is worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 1.5 lengths at Bendigo over 425m (24.14) beating Inchgower in Bottom Up - Maiden on April 15. Other runners look much more appealing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 1.5 lengths at Bendigo over 425m (24.14) beating Inchgower in Bottom Up - Maiden on April 15. Other runners look much more appealing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (25.48) over 450m at Ballarat. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fourth (25.48) over 450m at Ballarat. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled soon after start and lost ground.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.75 lengths at Geelong over 460m (25.83) beating Skate In Paris in Mix 6/7 on March 10. In form but prepared to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 2.75 lengths at Geelong over 460m (25.83) beating Skate In Paris in Mix 6/7 on March 10. In form but prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 15 over 525m at The Meadows in a Mix 6/7. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 15 over 525m at The Meadows in a Mix 6/7. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (25.54) at this track in a Mix 6/7. Lines up from box 8 for the first time. Can feature in the finish.
